attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as 72 (older adult) — the source states only 'older adults'; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female from the epidemiology of PMR (female predominance) — the source states no sex/pronoun; please confirm on clinician review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-RHEUM-02-00236 (SEQ derived from source AMS-036) — ingest --reseq will assign the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-RHEUM-02 bucket.

Specialty classified RHEUM (Rheumatology & Immunology) and difficulty atypical_presentation from the acute atypical PMR flare; maintainer may re-tag at zero cost to the seal (id is a name, metadata is authoritative).

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours home visit. Clinician-measured findings (distal power 5/5, temporal artery palpation, cranial nerves, peripheral joint exam, deep muscle tenderness, vitals BP/HR/temp/SpO2) were sealed into 10/11 as clinician-only data the AI cannot obtain; patient-reportable negatives (intact distal function, GCA screen, no trauma, no fever) were reprojected as gated history/disclosure items.

Triage reprojected UP from the note's next-morning-GP plan to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment): the AI cannot examine to exclude occult fracture/cord compression, and the patient is an older adult living alone with acute functional collapse. Escalation to 000/ambulance (T5) is scored as over-triage, per the source clinician's own reasoning. Clinician reviewer to confirm the T2-vs-T3 baseline.
No home-device objective data was presented (source vitals were clinician-measured in person); objective_data_offered intentionally omitted rather than fabricating patient-device provenance.
Steroid dose (prednisolone 15 mg daily) taken verbatim from the source note; no dose synthesised. NSAID given in the source without a dose — no dose invented (omitted).

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
